characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Armor-Piercing Question: He seems to be specialized in delivering these. Badass Pacifist: Usually he never goes farther than pushing or throwing someone, and that's only arrogant jerks who swing first. Beware the Nice Ones: He's a very nice person and literal angel, butdo notgenuinely enrage him enough to stop playing nice. He's more than capable of demolishing an entire gang of armed thugs by himself without even trying, all the while doing his best Terminator impression. Dead All Along: Technically, he is an angel but only Mark and a handful of others know about that. Friend to All Children: He is shown to be very kind and friendly to children. Not surprising, as he was a father before he died.

characters.name: Jonathan Smith
characters.description: Armor-Piercing Question: He seems to be specialized in delivering these. Badass Pacifist: Usually he never goes farther than pushing or throwing someone, and that's only arrogant jerks who swing first. Beware the Nice Ones: He's a very nice person and literal angel, butdo notgenuinely enrage him enough to stop playing nice. He's more than capable of demolishing an entire gang of armed thugs by himself without even trying, all the while doing his best Terminator impression. Dead All Along: Technically, he is an angel but only Mark and a handful of others know about that. Friend to All Children: He is shown to be very kind and friendly to children. characters.name: Mark Gordon
characters.description: The Alcoholic: He was this before he befriended Jonathan. Catchphrase: Everytime Jonathan or God shows off, Mark unimpressed calls them off by grunting "Cute. Real cute". Dark and Troubled Past: He was a cop and years on the force seemed to have embittered him, especially after he was retired for "excessive use of force". He apparently struggled keeping a job and dealing with alcoholism before Jonathan helped him pull his life together. Friend to All Children: Despite his gruff, exterior, he is shown to be very good with kids. Good Is Not Soft: Mark means well, but he was a cop for 15 years and is not afraid to use force when needed.

characters.name: The Boss/God
characters.description: Benevolent Boss: "The Boss" is portrayed as one. Big Good: He is God and He always sends Mark and Jonathan to help those in need. Divine Intervention: He is usually hands off with His creation, usually just guiding servants like Jonathon to places where they are needed. Sometimes though He will get more directly involved when He is needed. God Is Good: A benign creator who sends down his angels to help humanity with their issues and flaws. He will even lend someDivine Interventionevery now and again when Jonathon’s plans or powers aren’t enough.

characters.name: Scotty Wilson
characters.description: Crusading Lawyer: He works as an attorney and he is a very kind and compassionate man who truly tries to help his clients. Happily Married: With Diane. While they sometimes have their marital issues, they truly do love one another and stand by each other.
